quicksight.dashboard.missingdataconfigur: The configuration options that determine how missing data is treated during the rendering of a line chart.

quicksight.dashboard.missingdataconfigur.Description: The treatment option that determines how missing data should be rendered. Choose from the following options:  +  `INTERPOLATE`: Interpolate missing values between the prior and the next known value.+  `SHOW_AS_ZERO`: Show missing values as the value `0`.+  `SHOW_AS_BLANK`: Display a blank space when rendering missing data.
